ж—¶й—ҙиҪҙ

  • рҹҗј ApacheNIFI

    • рҹҗ  ApacheNIFIејҖеҸ‘

    • рҹҗЎ ApacheNIFIж•ҷзЁӢ

      • NIFIз®ҖеҸІ
      • NIFIжңҜиҜӯ
      • еёҰдҪ дҪ“йӘҢApache NIFI

      • еҗ„дёӘNARеҢ…еҠҹиғҪжҰӮиҝ°
      • NarеҢ…еҠ иҪҪжңәеҲ¶жәҗз Ғи§ЈиҜ»

      • жңҖеӨ§зәҝзЁӢжұ е’ҢеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁе№¶еҸ‘д»»еҠЎи®ҫзҪ®
      • Run Durationж·ұе…ҘзҗҶи§Ј
      • ContentRepositoryArchivingе·ҘдҪңеҺҹзҗҶ(иҜ‘)

      • жҺўзҙўNIFIйӣҶзҫӨзҡ„й«ҳеҸҜз”Ё

      • е»әи®®дҪҝз”ЁNIFIйҮҢзҡ„Record

        • е…¬дј—еҸ·

      • CaptureChangeMySQL

  • рҹҗј Docker

  • рҹҗј Java

  • рҹҗј Spring

NIFIејҖеҗҜHTTPS

PandaиҜҡ ... 2020-05-21 ApacheNIFIж•ҷзЁӢ
  • Apache NIFI
 еӨ§зәҰ 4 еҲҶй’ҹ
  • Step1
  • step2
  • Step3
  • е…¬дј—еҸ·

еүҚиЁҖпјҡApache NIFIжҳҜиҮӘеёҰз”ЁжҲ·йӘҢиҜҒгҖҒжқғйҷҗйӘҢиҜҒжЁЎеқ—зҡ„пјҢеҜ№з”ЁжҲ·е’Ңжқғйҷҗзҡ„жЁЎеқ—йғҪжңүиҜҰз»Ҷзҡ„и®ҫи®Ўе’ҢеҲ’еҲҶгҖӮдҪҶй»ҳи®Өй…ҚзҪ®дёӢжҲ‘д»¬дҪҝз”Ёзҡ„жҳҜNIFIзҡ„HTTPжңҚеҠЎпјҢHTTPжЁЎејҸдёӢпјҢNIFIжҳҜдёҚеҗҜз”Ёз”ЁжҲ·з®ЎзҗҶе’Ңжқғйҷҗз®ЎзҗҶжЁЎеқ—зҡ„гҖӮ

жң¬ж–Үе°ұеёҰйўҶеӨ§е®¶жқҘж—©жң¬ең°ејҖеҸ‘зҺҜеўғдёӢпјҢй…ҚзҪ®NIFIзҡ„HTTPSжЁЎејҸпјҢеҗҜз”Ёз”ЁжҲ·е’ҢжқғйҷҗжЁЎеқ—пјҢд»ҘдёӢдёәзӨәдҫӢиҜҙжҳҺпјҢе…ҲдёҚеҒҡеҺҹзҗҶйҳҗиҝ°гҖӮ

# Step1

еҮҶеӨҮkeystore.jks truststore.jksгҖӮиҝҷдёӨдёӘж–Үд»¶жҳҜд»Җд№ҲпјҢиҮӘиЎҢзҷҫеәҰгҖӮе…ідәҺдҪҝз”Ёjdkе·Ҙе…·з”ҹдә§jksзҡ„ж–ҮжЎЈзҪ‘дёҠжңүеҫҲеӨҡпјҢжӯӨеӨ„е°ұдёҚиөҳиҝ°гҖӮ

дҪңиҖ…еңЁиҝҷйҮҢдҪҝз”ЁдәҶеҸҰдёҖз§Қж–№ејҸиҺ·еҸ–дәҶиҜҒд№ҰпјҢд»…дҫӣеҸӮиҖғгҖӮ

  1. дҪҝз”ЁеҶ…еӨ–з©ҝйҖҸе·Ҙе…· иҠұз”ҹеЈі(иҮӘиЎҢдёӢиҪҪе®үиЈ…)пјҢиҺ·еҸ–жҳ е°„еҲ°жң¬ең°зҡ„дёҖдёӘеҹҹеҗҚгҖӮ

  1. еёҰзқҖиҝҷдёӘеҹҹеҗҚеҺ»жқҘжӯӨеҠ еҜҶ (opens new window)дёҠз”іиҜ·дёҖдёӘжӯЈејҸзҡ„иҜҒд№Ұ(3дёӘжңҲеҫ—жңүж•Ҳжңҹ)

  1. жң¬ең°иө·дёҖдёӘз®ҖеҚ•зҡ„80з«ҜеҸЈзҡ„Spring Boot ,еҒҡдёҖдёӘGetиҜ·жұӮ

  1. йӘҢиҜҒжҲҗеҠҹеҗҺиҺ·еҸ–иҜҒд№Ұ

  1. з”ҹдә§jksж–Үд»¶

з”ЁеҲ°дәҶиҝҷдёүдёӘж–Үд»¶ fullchain.pem private.pem certificate.pem(crtзӣҙжҺҘж”№жҲҗpemеҚіеҸҜ)пјҢз„¶еҗҺеңЁиҜҒд№Ұзӣ®еҪ•дҪҝз”Ёд»ҘдёӢдёүдёӘе‘Ҫд»ӨпјҢиҺ·еҸ–keystore.jks truststore.jks

openssl pkcs12 -export -in fullchain.pem -inkey private.pem -out fullchain_and_key.p12 -name nifi -passout pass:123456

keytool -importkeystore -deststorepass 123456   -destkeystore keystore.jks -srckeystore fullchain_and_key.p12 -srcstoretype PKCS12 -srcstorepass 123456  -alias nifi

keytool -importcert -alias rootCA -trustcacerts -file certificate.pem -keystore truststore.jks -storepass 123456
1
2
3
4
5

# step2

иҮӘе®ҡд№үprovider NIFIеҺҹз”ҹж”ҜжҢҒзҡ„ ldap-provider kerberos-provider,дҪҶжҗӯе»әе’Ңй…ҚзҪ®иө·жқҘжҜ”иҫғйә»зғҰпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸӘжғіеңЁжң¬ең°дҪ“йӘҢдёҖдёӢNIFI HTTPSпјҢжңҖз®ҖеҚ•зҡ„ж–№жі•е°ұжҳҜиҮӘе®ҡд№үдёҖдёӘprovider(еҸҜд»ҘзӣҙжҺҘеңЁnifi-ldap-iaa-providersйӮЈдёӘйЎ№зӣ®йҮҢе®ҡд№үпјҢд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘиҮӘе®ҡд№үеӯҗMoudleпјҢжү“narеҢ…ж”ҫеҲ°libдёӢ)

/**
 * иҮӘе®ҡд№үз”ЁжҲ·зҷ»йҷҶйӘҢиҜҒ
 *
 * @author zhangcheng
 */
public class CustomLoginIdentityProvider implements LoginIdentityProvider {

    private final Map<String, String> users;

    public CustomLoginIdentityProvider() {
        users = new HashMap<>();
        users.put("root", "admin");
    }

    private void checkUser(final String user, final String password) {
        if (!users.containsKey(user)) {
            throw new InvalidLoginCredentialsException("Unknown user");
        }

        if (!users.get(user).equals(password)) {
            throw new InvalidLoginCredentialsException("Invalid password");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public AuthenticationResponse authenticate(LoginCredentials credentials) throws InvalidLoginCredentialsException, IdentityAccessException {
        checkUser(credentials.getUsername(), credentials.getPassword());
        return new AuthenticationResponse(credentials.getUsername(), credentials.getUsername(), TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS.convert(1, TimeUnit.DAYS), getClass().getSimpleName());
    }

    @Override
    public void initialize(LoginIdentityProviderInitializationContext initializationContext) throws ProviderCreationException {
    }

    @Override
    public void onConfigured(LoginIdentityProviderConfigurationContext configurationContext) throws ProviderCreationException {
    }

    @Override
    public void preDestruction() {
    }

}

44

resourceдёӢзҡ„org.apache.nifi.authentication.LoginIdentityProviderж–Үд»¶ж·»еҠ CustomLoginIdentityProvider

org.apache.nifi.authentication.LoginIdentityProvider
org.apache.nifi.authentication.CustomLoginIdentityProvider
1
2

# Step3

е…ій—ӯиҠұз”ҹеЈіпјҢжҠҠдёҠйқўзҡ„еҹҹеҗҚдҝ®ж”№жң¬ең°HOSTS

й…ҚзҪ®NIFI дҝ®ж”№nifi.properties пјҢй…ҚзҪ®дҪ зҡ„еҹҹеҗҚгҖҒз«ҜеҸЈгҖҒjksж–Үд»¶гҖҒиҮӘе®ҡд№үprovider

nifi.web.war.directory=./lib
nifi.web.http.host=
nifi.web.http.port=
nifi.web.http.network.interface.default=

# дҝ®ж”№host
nifi.web.https.host=дҪ зҡ„еҹҹеҗҚ
nifi.web.https.port=443
nifi.web.https.network.interface.default=

#ж·»еҠ jks
nifi.security.keystore=жң¬ең°зӣ®еҪ•/keystore.jks
nifi.security.keystoreType=JKS
nifi.security.keystorePasswd=123456
nifi.security.keyPasswd=
nifi.security.truststore=жң¬ең°зӣ®еҪ•/truststore.jks
nifi.security.truststoreType=JKS
nifi.security.truststorePasswd=123456
nifi.security.user.authorizer=managed-authorizer

#иҮӘе®ҡд№үproviderй…ҚзҪ®
nifi.security.user.login.identity.provider=custom-provider

22

login-identity-providers.xmlж·»еҠ 

 <provider>
    <identifier>custom-provider</identifier>
    <class>org.apache.nifi.authentication.CustomLoginIdentityProvider</class>
</provider>
1
2
3
4

authorizers.xmlдҝ®ж”№

 <userGroupProvider>
        <identifier>file-user-group-provider</identifier>
        <class>org.apache.nifi.authorization.FileUserGroupProvider</class>
        <property name="Users File">./conf/users.xml</property>
        <property name="Legacy Authorized Users File"></property>
<!-- ж·»еҠ root -->
        <property name="Initial User Identity 1">root</property>
    </userGroupProvider>
<accessPolicyProvider>
        <identifier>file-access-policy-provider</identifier>
        <class>org.apache.nifi.authorization.FileAccessPolicyProvider</class>
        <property name="User Group Provider">file-user-group-provider</property>
        <property name="Authorizations File">./conf/authorizations.xml</property>
        <!-- ж·»еҠ root -->
        <property name="Initial Admin Identity">root</property>
        <property name="Legacy Authorized Users File"></property>
        <property name="Node Identity 1"></property>
        <property name="Node Group"></property>
    </accessPolicyProvider>

# step4

еҗҜеҠЁNIFI еҚіеҸҜиҝӣе…Ҙзҷ»еҪ•йЎөйқў root/admin ејҖе§ӢдҪҝз”Ёз”ЁжҲ·з®ЎзҗҶжЁЎеқ— жқғйҷҗз®ЎзҗҶжЁЎеқ—

# е…¬дј—еҸ·

е…іжіЁе…¬дј—еҸ· еҫ—еҲ°з¬¬дёҖжүӢж–Үз« /ж–ҮжЎЈжӣҙж–°жҺЁйҖҒгҖӮ

дёҠж¬Ўзј–иҫ‘дәҺ: 2021е№ҙ10жңҲ29ж—Ҙ 20:25

иҜҘеә”з”ЁеҸҜд»Ҙе®үиЈ…еңЁжӮЁзҡ„ PC жҲ–з§»еҠЁи®ҫеӨҮдёҠгҖӮиҝҷе°ҶдҪҝиҜҘ Web еә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸеӨ–и§Ӯе’ҢиЎҢдёәдёҺе…¶д»–еә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸзӣёеҗҢгҖӮе®ғе°ҶеңЁеҮәзҺ°еңЁеә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸеҲ—иЎЁдёӯпјҢе№¶еҸҜд»Ҙеӣәе®ҡеҲ°дё»еұҸе№•пјҢејҖе§ӢиҸңеҚ•жҲ–д»»еҠЎж ҸгҖӮжӯӨ Web еә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸиҝҳе°ҶиғҪеӨҹдёҺе…¶д»–еә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸе’ҢжӮЁзҡ„ж“ҚдҪңзі»з»ҹе®үе…Ёең°иҝӣиЎҢдәӨдә’гҖӮ

иҜҰжғ…
